name: Couscous with Pine Nuts and Currants
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter; melted and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute mushrooms and pine nuts in 2 tablespoons melted butter in a small skillet, until mushrooms are tender. Remove from heat; set aside.
2. Saute onion, celery, parsley, and garlic in remaining 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet until tender.
3. Add reserved mushroom mixture, currants, and seasonings; stir well.
4. Add chicken broth; bring to a boil.
5. Add couscous, stirring well. Cover, remove from heat, and let stand 10 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
